seoTitle: How to Connect Instagram to n8n and Automate Posts
metaDescription: Learn how to link an Instagram Business account to n8n through Meta developer credentials so you can automatically publish posts.
intro: Publishing to Instagram directly from an n8n workflow requires connecting through Meta's developer platform, since Instagram automation runs on the Facebook Graph API. This guide covers setting up your credentials, linking your business account, and structuring a post payload to automate publishing.

steps.heading: Add the Instagram node
steps.body: Place the Instagram Business node onto your workflow canvas where you want to publish content.

steps.heading: Create a credential profile
steps.body: Set up a new n8n credential and note the OAuth redirect URL it provides.

steps.heading: Register an app with Meta
steps.body: Go to the Meta for Developers portal to link your business profile and generate app credentials.

steps.heading: Paste your keys into n8n
steps.body: Copy your client ID and secret back into n8n to complete the authentication handshake.

steps.heading: Configure your post and test
steps.body: Set the media operation with your image URL and caption, then run a test to confirm publishing works.

faq.question: Do I need a Facebook Developer account to connect Instagram to n8n?
faq.answer: Yes, Instagram automation runs through Meta's developer platform, so you'll need to register an app there.

faq.question: Can I schedule Instagram posts with n8n?
faq.answer: You can trigger posts based on your workflow's schedule or events, effectively creating automated publishing timing.

faq.question: What type of content can I post through n8n to Instagram?
faq.answer: Typically image-based posts with captions, depending on what the Instagram node's media operation supports.

faq.question: Why does connecting Instagram require an OAuth redirect URL?
faq.answer: The redirect URL is part of the secure OAuth handshake that authorizes n8n to act on your Instagram business account.
